Normalize feature identifiers

Source: R/QC.R
normalize_feature_ids.Rd

Extract the leading token before the first semicolon, replace missing or invalid identifiers with sequential unknown labels, and append suffixes such as .1, .2 to duplicated identifiers to ensure uniqueness.

Usage

normalize_feature_ids(x)

Arguments

x

A character vector containing raw feature identifiers.

Value

A character vector of normalized, unique feature identifiers.
